name: What if symptoms of low AI visibility are delayed?

mainEntity.name: What if symptoms of low AI visibility are delayed?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Diagnose with audits even if traffic seems ok; AI lags organic.** Check citation frequency in Perplexity/ChatGPT.[3]

Delayed due to retrain cycles.

**Key Factors:**
- No direct metrics.[3]
- Competitor rise.
- Schema decay.

**Practical Guidance:** Run AI queries weekly, fix top issues, refresh content. Patience + action.

Spot hidden drops early.
